creator: mats@dufberg.se
text:
When gimp-gutenprint-5.1.0 (print/gimp-gutenprint) is installed, the files that are registred on gimp-gutenprint-5.1.0 overlaps with the files installed by gutenprint-base-5.1.0_1 (print/gutenprint-base). According to print/gimp-gutenprint/pkg-plist the only file that should be installed is libexec/gimp/2.2/plug-ins/print, but when the installation is completed, there is a long list of files registred on gimp-gutenprint-5.1.0. From the timestamp I can see that only /usr/local/libexec/gimp/2.2/plug-ins/print is in fact installed. The othere files are installed by gutenprint-base-5.1.0_1.

When I run "pkgdb -L" I get the following error message when the program reaches gimp-gutenprint-5.1.0:

 /bin/sh:Argument list too long
 can't convert nil into String

If gimp-gutenprint-5.1.0 is deinstalled, then the files of gutenprint-base-5.1.0_1  are removed.

Listing the files of gimp-gutenprint-5.1.0 gives an unexpected long list:

kafka:/home/dufberg> pkg_info -L gimp-gutenprint-5.1.0

How-To-Repeat: 1. Make sure that no "gutenprint" ports are installed, i.e. the follwing command should report no ports:
  pkg_info -I "*guten*"

2. Install  print/gutenprint-base:
  cd /usr/ports/print/gutenprint-base
  make
  make install

3. List the files installed by gutenprint-base-5.1.0_1 and make sure the
exist:
  ls -l $( pkg_info -qL  gutenprint-base-5.1.0_1 )

4. Install print/gimp-gutenprint:
  cd /usr/port/print/gimp-gutenprint
  make
  make install

5. Compare the files installed by gutenprint-base-5.1.0_1 by the files reported to be installed by gimp-gutenprint-5.1.0:
  ls -l $( pkg_info -qL gimp-gutenprint-5.1.0 )

6. Deinstall gimp-gutenprint-5.1.0:
  pkg_delete gimp-gutenprint-5.1.0 

7. Note that gutenprint-base-5.1.0_1 is now currupt:
  ls -l $( pkg_info -qL  gutenprint-base-5.1.0_1 )
